name: app_store_reviews_scraper
title: App Store Reviews Scraper
description: Fetch public Apple App Store review rows for a numeric app ID or App Store URL, returning review IDs, titles, body text, star ratings, authors, author profile URLs, dates, vote counts, and review URLs.

seo.title: App Store Reviews Scraper Tool for iOS Feedback
seo.description: Extract public Apple App Store reviews with Better Fetch, including review IDs, titles, body text, star ratings, authors, dates, vote counts, and review URLs.
seo.intro: App Store Reviews Scraper gives agents a validated path into public iOS review feedback. Provide a numeric Apple App Store ID or App Store URL and the tool reads Apple's public iTunes Store customer-reviews API, normalizing review IDs, titles, body text, star ratings, author names, author profile URLs, publication dates, vote counts, and review URLs.

useCases.title: iOS sentiment snapshots
useCases.description: Pull the latest public App Store review page for your app or a competitor and send structured review text into an agent or analytics workflow.

useCases.title: Release monitoring
useCases.description: Track review titles, body text, ratings, and dates after an iOS release to catch regressions and recurring complaints.

useCases.title: Cross-platform feedback
useCases.description: Pair App Store reviews with Google Play reviews so product teams can compare iOS and Android sentiment with a normalized schema.

faqs.question: Does App Store Reviews Scraper fetch every review?
faqs.answer: No. Version 0.1 fetches one public review page (up to 50 reviews) at a time. Multi-page orchestration and multi-country fan-out should be separate validated slices.

faqs.question: Can I pass an App Store URL instead of an ID?
faqs.answer: Yes. The tool accepts numeric Apple app IDs or App Store URLs containing an id segment, such as an apps.apple.com URL.

faqs.question: Does this require App Store Connect credentials?
faqs.answer: No. The tool reads public customer-review data through Better Fetch and does not require App Store Connect or account-specific Apple credentials.

app_id_or_url.description: Numeric Apple App Store app ID or apps.apple.com URL containing an id segment.

country.description: Two-letter App Store country code, such as US, AU, GB, or DE.

page.description: Review page to fetch (50 most-recent reviews per page).

max_reviews.description: Maximum reviews to return from the page.

source_url.description: Fetched iTunes Store customer-reviews API URL

reviews.description: Public Apple App Store review rows

version.description: App version reported with the review, when Apple provides it (the current public reviews API omits it)

url.description: App Store reviews URL for the app
